sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
The blue block moved right. Looking at the image, the blue block is now directly above the left yellow block. Let me check if they're adjacent now.
I've used 50 actions. Let me check the adjacency and see if the blue block is now touching the left yellow block.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check positions and adjacency
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ('b', 'Y'):
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"{n['color']}: row=[{min(rows)},{max(rows)}], col=[{min(cols)},{max(cols)}]")

adj = seg['adjacency_list']
print("\nAdjacency (blue/yellow):")
for a in adj:
    i, j = a
    ci = cj = ''
    for n in seg['nodes']:
        if n['id'] == i: ci = n['color']
        if n['id'] == j: cj = n['color']
    if ci in ('b', 'Y') or cj in ('b', 'Y'):
        print(f"  {i}({ci}) -- {j}({cj})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
